nodes.name: evaluation.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive guide for creating MCP server evaluations. Covers requirements for crafting 10 read-only, independent, non-destructive question-answer pairs that require multiple tool calls to resolve. Includes output format specification in XML and purpose explanation.

nodes.name: example_evaluation.xml
nodes.summary: Example XML evaluation document for an MCP server. Demonstrates the qa_pair structure with question and answer elements as used in MCP server evaluation testing.

nodes.name: mcp_best_practices.md
nodes.summary: Best practices reference for building MCP servers. Covers tool design, resource structuring, error handling, security considerations, and deployment guidelines for production MCP servers.

nodes.name: node_mcp_server.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive guide for building MCP servers with Node.js. Covers setup, tool definition, resource handling, prompt registration, authentication, error handling, and deployment patterns using the MCP SDK for TypeScript/JavaScript.

nodes.name: python_mcp_server.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive guide for building MCP servers with Python using FastMCP. Covers tool definition, resource handling, prompt creation, context access, authentication, async patterns, and deployment to FastMCP Cloud.

nodes.name: requirements.txt
nodes.summary: Python dependency requirements file for MCP builder skill resources. Lists minimal Python package requirements needed to run MCP builder examples.
